stories.headline: Moonshot AI Raises $2 Billion at $20 Billion Valuation in Meituan-Led Round
stories.key_takeaway: Moonshot AI has quadrupled its valuation to $20 billion in six months, raising $3.9 billion total as its Kimi chatbot ARR surged to $200 million.

pull_quote.text: By orchestrating 100 or even 1,000 sub-agents in parallel, we can accomplish complex tasks within a timeframe that is tolerable for the real world.

stories.headline: SAP Acquires Prior Labs With EUR1 Billion Commitment to Build Europes Leading Frontier AI Lab
stories.key_takeaway: SAP is betting more than EUR1 billion on Prior Labs to build a European frontier AI lab focused on tabular foundation models for enterprise data.

pull_quote.text: Early on, SAP recognized that the greatest untapped opportunity in enterprise AI was not large language models; it was AI built for the structured data that runs the worlds businesses.

stories.headline: ChatGPT Ad Pilot Widens as OpenAI Launches Self-Serve Ads Manager for Small Businesses
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI dropped its $50,000 minimum spend and launched a self-serve Ads Manager with CPC bidding, opening ChatGPT advertising to small businesses.

pull_quote.text: By adding things like an ads manager, CPC bidding, pixel measurement and CAPI, OpenAI is demonstrating that it understands the basic building blocks that are necessary for advertisers to feel comfortable testing on ChatGPT.

stories.headline: EPAM and Anthropic Forge Multi-Year Partnership to Deploy Claude Across Global 2000 Enterprises
stories.key_takeaway: EPAM is committing to certify 10,000 Claude architects and 250 Black Belt engineers, one of the largest single-platform AI workforce investments by a global SI.

pull_quote.text: Together, we are helping enterprises strengthen operational resilience and meet their business objectives by taking AI from concept to production across Claude, Claude Code, Claude Security, and our Agent SDK.

stories.headline: American Electric Power Pipeline Surges to 63 Gigawatts as AI Data Centers Drive $78 Billion Capital Plan
stories.key_takeaway: AEP contracted data center load pipeline surged 13 percent in a single quarter to 63 gigawatts, driving a $6 billion increase in its five-year capital plan to $78 billion.

stories.headline: Google Shuts Down Project Mariner and Folds Browser Agent Technology Into Gemini
stories.key_takeaway: Google quietly shut down Project Mariner on May 4 after 17 months, folding its browser-agent technology into Gemini Agent as the industry shifts toward API-first architectures.

pull_quote.text: Google quietly shut down Project Mariner yesterday, the web-browsing AI agent it highlighted onstage last year at Google IO.

stories.headline: OpenAI Drops Three Voice Models That Translate 70 Languages in Real Time
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI released three real-time voice models bringing GPT-5-class reasoning and 70-language live translation to developers, positioning voice as enterprise infrastructure.

pull_quote.text: What stood out about GPT-Realtime-2 was the intelligence and tool-calling reliability it brings to complex voice interactions.

stories.headline: Subquadratic Exits Stealth With $29 Million and a 12 Million Token Context Window That Challenges Transformer Orthodoxy
stories.key_takeaway: Miami startup Subquadratic launched with $29M seed funding and a 12-million-token context window on novel sparse attention, but independent verification of 1,000x claims remains outstanding.

pull_quote.text: Sparse attention is an effort to say, hey, let us try to figure out how to not compare every token to every token to every token.

stories.headline: Genesis AI Unveils GENE-26.5 Robotic Brain With Human-Level Dexterity After $105 Million Seed Round
stories.key_takeaway: Genesis AI GENE-26.5 foundation model and proprietary robotic hand demonstrate unprecedented dexterous manipulation, backed by $105 million from Khosla and Eric Schmidt.

stories.headline: Investigation Finds Thousands of AI-Built Apps Leaking Sensitive Data Across Lovable Replit and Base44
stories.key_takeaway: More than 5,000 apps built with AI vibe coding platforms were found with little or no authentication, with nearly 40 percent leaking sensitive data.

pull_quote.text: AI coding tools only do what is asked of them. So if a user does not ask for security explicitly, the app may not be secure by default.

stories.headline: Connecticut Passes One of Americas Most Comprehensive AI Laws Covering Employment Youth and Chatbots
stories.key_takeaway: Connecticut passed a 71-page bipartisan AI law covering employment discrimination, youth chatbot safety, and frontier AI whistleblower protections.

pull_quote.text: There is no longer doubt that the nature of work, the nature of life, is going to change rapidly with the continued evolution of AI. This is about protecting people without stopping that innovation.

stories.headline: Microsoft Report Finds Global AI Usage Jumped to 17.8 Percent With UAE Leading at 70 Percent Adoption
stories.key_takeaway: Global generative AI usage reached 17.8 percent of working-age adults in Q1 2026, with UAE leading at 70.1 percent, but the North-South adoption gap widened.

pull_quote.text: The quarter brought continued widening of the AI gap between the Global North and South, with usage now at 27.5 percent in the North and 15.4 percent in the South.

stories.article_excerpt: Nearly one in five working-age adults worldwide now uses generative AI, but the benefits are accumulating fastest in wealthy nations.

stories.headline: India Enterprise Tech Spending to Rise 6.8 Percent in 2026 as AI Transformation Commands 45 Percent of Budgets
stories.key_takeaway: Indian enterprises will spend 6-8 percent more on technology in 2026, with AI consuming 40-45 percent of change budgets, but 90 percent admit data foundations are not ready.

pull_quote.text: At a time when AI is accelerating the pace of change, it is no longer only about modernizing technology stacks or addressing technical debt. Now is the time to go future back and reimagine the enterprise.

stories.headline: 2026 Emerges as the Year of AI-Assisted Cyber Attacks With Automated Exploits Surging Across Enterprise Networks
stories.key_takeaway: AI-enabled cyber attacks surged 89 percent in 2026 with breakout times falling to 29 minutes, as automated exploits reshape the threat landscape.

pull_quote.text: This is an AI arms race. Breakout time is the clearest signal of how intrusion has changed. Adversaries are moving from initial access to lateral movement in minutes.

stories.headline: Bain Study Shows AI-Generated Shoppers Match 90 Percent of Real Customer Research Findings
stories.key_takeaway: Bain backtest of AI-generated synthetic shoppers against a real conjoint study found they replicated 90 percent of findings at one-third the cost.

pull_quote.text: Synthetic personas are force multipliers, not foundations. They should supplement, not supplant, direct engagement with real customers.
